items.text: Moonshot AI suspended new Kimi K3 subscriptions after 48 hours of surging demand maxed out its compute, promising batch reopenings and an open-weights release by July 27.
items.text_zh: 月之暗面因 48 小时内需求激增逼近算力上限，暂停 Kimi K3 新用户订阅，将分批恢复名额，并计划 7 月 27 日开源模型权重。

items.text: Fireworks AI found routing between Kimi K3 and Claude Fable 5 hits 93% accuracy on roughly 1,000 agentic tasks, at up to 50x lower cost than Fable alone.
items.text_zh: Fireworks AI 实测约 1000 个智能体任务：在 Kimi K3 与 Claude Fable 5 之间智能路由可达 93% 准确率，成本最高比单用 Fable 低 50 倍。

items.text: After a viral weekend acquisition rumor that Physical Intelligence's CEO denied, The Information reported Anthropic did hold acquisition talks with the robotics startup this spring.
items.text_zh: 周末疯传"Anthropic 收购 Physical Intelligence"，虽遭后者 CEO 否认，但 The Information 证实双方今年春季确曾进行过收购谈判。

items.text: Security startup Glow emerged from stealth at a $1.2 billion valuation, aiming to rebuild endpoint protection for the AI era.
items.text_zh: 安全初创公司 Glow 以 12 亿美元估值走出隐身模式，瞄准 AI 时代重做终端安全防护。

items.text: Cisco's Foundation AI released Antares, open-weight 350M and 1B parameter models trained to localize known vulnerabilities inside real codebases.
items.text_zh: 思科 Foundation AI 发布开源权重模型 Antares（3.5 亿与 10 亿参数两档），专门用于在真实代码库中定位已知安全漏洞。

items.text: NVIDIA released Cosmos 3 Edge, a 4B-parameter open world model that reasons and generates robot actions directly on-device.
items.text_zh: 英伟达发布 Cosmos 3 Edge：40 亿参数的开放世界模型，可在机器人端侧设备上直接完成推理并生成动作。

items.text: Meta open-sourced Astryx, an agent-ready React design system shipping more than 150 accessible components, seven themes, and a CLI.
items.text_zh: Meta 开源 Astryx：面向 AI Agent 的 React 设计系统，自带 150 多个无障碍组件、七套主题和命令行工具。

items.text: Alibaba's Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS Plus took the top spot in text-to-speech rankings; the hosted model ships in Flash and Plus tiers across 16 languages.
items.text_zh: 阿里 Qwen-Audio-3.0-TTS Plus 登顶文本转语音榜单；这一托管模型分 Flash 和 Plus 两档，覆盖 16 种语言。

items.text: Xiaomi's Xiaomi-Robotics-1 findings suggest scaling training data matters more than scaling model size when teaching robots to move and manipulate objects.
items.text_zh: 小米 Xiaomi-Robotics-1 研究显示：训练机器人运动和操作物体时，扩充数据量比加大模型规模更有效。

items.text: OpenAI launched a ChatGPT for small business program with training academies, guides and partner agents from Shopify, Intuit and others, touting 10 million ChatGPT Work and Codex users.
items.text_zh: OpenAI 推出小微企业版 ChatGPT 计划，提供培训学院、上手指南及 Shopify、Intuit 等伙伴定制 Agent，并宣布 ChatGPT Work 和 Codex 用户已达 1000 万。

items.text: Nubank founder David Vélez and BNY CEO Robin Vince joined the boards of the OpenAI Foundation and OpenAI Group PBC, adding financial expertise amid IPO expectations.
items.text_zh: Nubank 创始人 David Vélez 与纽约梅隆银行 CEO Robin Vince 加入 OpenAI 基金会及 OpenAI Group PBC 董事会，在 IPO 预期升温之际补强金融班底。

items.text: Unitree founder Wang Xingxing said embodied AI's 'ChatGPT moment' could arrive within two to three years at the earliest, urging the industry to prepare now.
items.text_zh: 宇树科技王兴兴表示，具身智能的"ChatGPT 时刻"最快有望在两三年内到来，呼吁行业提前做好准备。

items.text: An AI case-management system helped Pakistani judges clear massive court backlogs, delivering an estimated $38.50 return for every dollar invested.
items.text_zh: 一套 AI 办案系统帮助巴基斯坦法官清理大量积压案件，估算每投入 1 美元可产生 38.5 美元回报。

items.text: BloombergNEF projects US data centers will use four times more electricity by 2035, about one-fifth of national supply and 83% above its December forecast.
items.text_zh: BloombergNEF 预测：到 2035 年美国数据中心用电量将增至当前四倍、约占全国供电五分之一，较去年 12 月的预测上调 83%。
